title: Audit CI/CD variable exposure
description: Enumerate every variable, its protected/masked flags, and the pipelines that can read it, then tighten over-exposed ones.
body: Steps: 1. List project, group, and instance CI/CD variables in scope. 2. For each, record whether it is Protected, Masked, and environment-scoped. 3. Determine which pipelines can read it (protected variables only on protected refs; unprotected on any branch and fork MRs). 4. Flag any secret that is unprotected, unmasked, or readable by fork MR pipelines. 5. Tighten flags and re-check that feature-branch pipelines no longer see it. Rollback point: variable settings are reversible in project settings. Validation: the audit is the gate; a secret readable outside protected refs is unverified until fixed.
